title: disphenia arborea
intro: Disphenia arborea, also known as Disphania, is a plant species that belongs to the family Amaranthaceae, native to Australia and commonly found in the eastern and southern regions. The medicinal properties of Disphenia arborea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Disphenia arborea is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a poultice or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
